product_overview.name: AutoArchitect
product_overview.description: A dual-interface orchestration engine that transforms project descriptions into high-fidelity technical assets through a 3-step AI pipeline.
product_overview.core_value_prop: Bridge the gap between vision and code with zero friction using a shared logic core between CLI and Web.

user_goals: Eliminate manual boilerplate generation for new SaaS projects.
Provide technical stakeholders with a machine-readable PRD (JSON) and a human-readable blueprint.
Enable local development parity via CLI commands that mirror web functionality.
Ensure SEO dominance for 'code generation' and 'boilerplate' keywords.

routes.label: Home
routes.description: Marketing landing page with one-click generator

routes.label: Documentation
routes.description: CLI installation guides and API documentation

routes.label: Blueprint Viewer
routes.description: Interactive view of the generated UI/UX and PRD

commands.description: Configure the local environment and authenticate with the platform.

flags.--step: Run specific pipeline step: uiux | prd | scaffold

pipeline_architecture.shared_logic: @autoarch/core library used by both Next.js Edge Functions and Node.js CLI

prompt_storage_strategy.runtime: Hydrated via edge-config or local file system based on interface context

non_functional_requirements.performance: P99 Response time < 40s for full 3-step generation
non_functional_requirements.seo: 100/100 Lighthouse SEO score on Web Landing Page
non_functional_requirements.mobile: Responsive generator interface with persistent progress tracking
non_functional_requirements.reliability: Retry-logic with exponential backoff for LLM rate limits

future_extensibility: Live Preview Editor for UI/UX blueprints
